name: codex-pet-forge
description: Create identity-locked Codex v2 pets from one character reference image.

interface.shortDescription: Turn one character image into a coherent Codex pet.
interface.longDescription: A quality-first, token-light workflow that derives one canonical rig and eight-view turnaround, generates meaningful full action rows, validates identity and motion continuity, previews loops, and installs Codex v2 pets.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create a production Codex pet from my single uploaded reference using the identity-locked canonical-rig workflow.
